form.formComment: Resuming after a seven months break. Finished off last preparation 14th of 21 at Doncaster September 11 over 1310m, 11 len behind Calendar Girl with 59kg at $101. On debut eighth of 13 at Ascot April 30 over 1000m, 4 len behind Wise Approach with 59kg at $19. Minor claims at best.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning won by nose Wolverhampton October 20 over 1200m defeating Noble Vow carrying 60.5kg at $2.40. On debut third of 13 at Wolverhampton October 4 over 1220m, 2 len behind Coconut Cove with 60.5kg at $4. Has ability and looks one of the better chances.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Freshened for 55 days. First-up tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at this track on January 19 over 1200m, neck behind Up The Agenda carrying 60kg at $6. Second run from a spell won by a nose at Chelmsford February 12 over 1200m defeating Manly Fireball with 57.5kg at $4.50. Key chance expected to feature.
